Definition: The deepest point of the antegonial notch on the lower border of the left mandible.
The deepest point of the antegonial notch on the lower border of the right mandible.
The point of intersection of the posterior border of the left condylar neck and the inferior border of the cranial base.
The point of intersection of the posterior border of the right condylar neck and the inferior border of the cranial base.
The most superior point on the contour of the left mandibular condylar head.
The most superior point on the contour of the right mandibular condylar head.
The most superior point of the left coronoid process.
The most superior point of the right coronoid process.
The most inferior and posterior point at the angle of the left mandible.
The most inferior and posterior point at the angle of the right mandible.
The geometric center of the left mandibular foramen.
The geometric center of the right mandibular foramen.
The most inferior point on the outline of the mandibular symphysis.
The geometric center of the left mental foramen.
The geometric center of the right mental foramen.
The lowest point on the left infraorbital margin.
The lowest point on the right infraorbital margin.
The lowest point of the teardrop-shaped radiolucency of the pterygomaxillary fissure on the left side.
The lowest point of the teardrop-shaped radiolucency of the pterygomaxillary fissure on the right side.
The deepest point of the mandibular (sigmoid) notch between the coronoid process and the condyle on the left side.
The deepest point of the mandibular (sigmoid) notch between the coronoid process and the condyle on the right side.
The deepest point of the mandibular (sigmoid) notch between the coronoid process and the condyle on the left side.
The deepest point of the mandibular (sigmoid) notch between the coronoid process and the condyle on the right side.
